findings.description: Section s4 merges two distinct source headings — "nameAlias属性の使用方法" and "コード値の表示" — into a single section. These cover unrelated features (multi-field highlight via nameAlias vs. code-value display tags) and correspond to separate headings in the source RST. They should be split into s4 and s5.
findings.source_evidence: Source has separate headings: "nameAlias属性の使用方法" (underlined with ==============================) and "コード値の表示" (underlined with ======================================================, preceded by .. _code_tag: label), each covering an independent feature area.
